skillSlots.name: Night Hunt Starshot
skillSlots.description: Summon 4 Star Arrows to attack enemies randomly, dealing 200% ATK as Magic Damage per arrow; 80% chance to apply [Stellar Seal]. Targets hit multiple times take only 30% damage for subsequent hits.

skillSlots.name: Divine Hell Implosion
skillSlots.description: Deal a total of 900% Magic Damage to all enemies (shared among all hit targets, with each target's damage capped at 400% of the attacker's ATK), and 100% chance to randomly distribute 6 stacks of [Stellar Seal] to all hit targets.

effects.name: Stellar Vault Sunshroud
effects.description: When casting the Ultimate Skill for the first time, change the battlefield to [Eternal Night], lasting until the end of the battle.

effects.name: Stellar Vault Sunshroud
effects.description: In [Eternal Night], increase your ATK and Crit Rate by 20%.

effects.name: Stellar Vault Sunshroud
effects.description: When casting [Night Hunt Star Arrow] in [Eternal Night], the number of summoned Star Arrows increases to 6.

effects.name: Stellar Vault Sunshroud
effects.description: When casting [Divine Hell Implosion] in [Eternal Night], deal 180% ATK as Magic Damage to the enemy with the most [Stellar Seal] stacks, and 100% chance to apply 1 stack of [Stellar Seal].

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: In [Eternal Night], allies have a 25% chance to apply 1 stack of [Stellar Seal] to the target when dealing damage with attacks.

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description:
Gain 1 stack of [Cosmic Robe] at the end of the turn in [Eternal Night].
[Cosmic Robe]: Each stack increases Effect Resist Rate and True Damage Reduction by 10%; consumes 1 stack to resist control effects when affected. Lasts 2 turns, undispellable.

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: Immediately replace the battlefield with [Eternal Night] at the start of battle; ignore 20% of the target's Defense when attacking enemies with [Stellar Seal].

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: The trigger condition for [Shattered Vault Formation] changes to a total of 7 actions by both allies and enemies.

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: [Divine Hell Implosion] deals an additional 50% ATK as Magic Damage, 50% chance to apply 1 stack of [Stellar Seal], and is castable on the first turn; each Ultimate Skill cast permanently reduces the cooldown of all your skills by 1 turn.
